subcodes.first_line: ...Mrs. Maxwell is in very truth a mercy from God and a token of His grace.  In assisting the friends she is self-sacrificing, and in firmness in the Covenant she is a heavenly example
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز نامه تو رسید از مضمون سرور حاصل گردید زیرا دلالت بر روحانیت محضه
